PSR Ratings (Player Skill Rating)

Source: R/player_ratings.R
psr_ratings.Rd

Computes skill-based ratings for each player-round: psr (margin-based total), plus osr (offensive) and dsr (defensive) components that sum to psr.

Usage

psr_ratings(
  season_val = get_afl_season(type = "current"),
  round_val = get_afl_week(type = "next"),
  psr_coef_path = NULL
)

Arguments

season_val

Season to compute PSR for. Default is current season.

round_val

Round to filter to. If NULL (default), returns all rounds.

psr_coef_path

Optional path to the margin PSR coefficient CSV. If NULL, uses the bundled inst/extdata/psr_coefficients.csv.

Value

A data.table with columns: player_id, player_name, season, round, pos_group, psr_raw, psr, osr, dsr.

See also

torp_ratings for the full blended rating, epr_ratings for possession-value ratings only.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  psr_df <- psr_ratings(2026, 1)
  psr_df <- psr_ratings(2026)      # all rounds
} # }
